model_name: Atlanta Housing Pulse — Displacement Risk Index & GBM Classifier
description: Composite index and gradient boosting classifier for housing displacement risk at census tract level in the Atlanta metro area.

training_data.geography: Census tracts — Fulton, DeKalb, Gwinnett, Cobb, Clayton counties, Georgia
training_data.suppression_handling: Census placeholder -666666666 coerced to NaN; affected tracts retained in raw table but excluded from DRI scoring

gbm_evaluation.note: GBM is used for DRI validation and feature importance, not as primary risk output

known_limitations: ACS 5-Year data lags current conditions by 2-3 years
DRI weights are defensible but alternative weighting schemes produce modestly different rankings
Tract-level averages may mask individual household distress in lower-risk tracts
Forecast assumes historical patterns continue; structural policy changes not captured
Gentrification flag identifies preconditions, not confirmed gentrification events
intended_use: Housing resource allocation, proactive outreach targeting, policy prioritization
out_of_scope_use: Individual household eligibility decisions, real-time eviction risk prediction
